sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13605" key="a)po/rreuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-ρρευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n13605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which distils,</tr_> as from a tree, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
